title: 2-year Treasury note yield hits highest since February 2025
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose four basis points, to 4.491%.
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose four basis points, to 4.491%.
